summary.daily_briefing:
# Daily Commercial Briefing

Generated: 2026-04-16T06:32:32.663127+02:00

## Key Metrics
- Revenue: R0.00
- Orders: 0
- AOV: R0.00
- Units per transaction: 0
- GP%: 0.00%
- New vs returning: 0 new / 0 returning

## Trends
- Discount usage: 0 orders, R0.00 discounted
- Active customers (180d): 212
- Repeat purchase rate: 5.19%
- Stockout risks: 0
- Competitor price-match risks: 0

## Alerts
- No data

## Recommended Actions
- Replenish SKUs with <7 days cover, prioritising top revenue lines.
- Push repeat-purchase campaigns into Klaviyo for churn-risk customers.
- Review discount-heavy orders for margin leakage.
- Shift inventory away from overstocked branches into demand nodes.

summary_lines: Online R42.90 from 1 orders, AOV R42.90.
Physical MTD R848,204.79, focus store Glen Village at 35.50% of target.
0 high-value lapsed customers, 8 winning SKUs at stock risk, 1 approval-gated recommendations.
highlights: Online trade delivered R42.90 from 1 orders at 0.00% GP.
Physical stores are sitting on R848,204.79 MTD revenue, with Glen Village currently the main pace risk.
8 winning SKUs are already showing stock pressure, led by DELFRAN - Pcositol - 30 Sachets.
Customer base shows 0 high-value lapsed customers and 77 buyers due for repeat.
Top geo demand is concentrated in Pretoria with R28,359.73 in the 90d view.
Competitor scan shows 6 clear price wins and 0 price-position risks.
actions: Protect winning SKU DELFRAN - Pcositol - 30 Sachets first, it produced R3,707.34 in 90d and is already under stock pressure.
Treat Glen Village as the branch priority, it is running at 35.5% of MTD target with pressure on same-day recovery.

Push the next content batch around 'Current TikTok winners cluster around brain fog, stress, sleep, and energy hooks.' and point it at NEUROACTIVE - Neuro Day Plus - 60 Veg Capsules, HEEL - Lymphomyosot N Oral Drops - 30ml, YOUR WELLBEING - Cholest-Well - 60 Capsules.

approval_gated_actions.title: Protect DELFRAN - Pcositol - 30 Sachets
approval_gated_actions.description: Approve branch transfer, reorder, or supplier follow-up for DELFRAN - Pcositol - 30 Sachets (6009801022451).
approval_gated_actions.reason: Read-only brief identified a winning SKU with live stock risk.
approval_gated_actions.recommended_decision: Choose the lowest-risk replenishment move before demand outpaces stock cover.
decision_options: Place or expedite a replenishment order

execution.blocked_reason: Branch transfers, supplier reorders, and Omni stock moves stay manual because Omni remains the source of truth.

guardrails: Recommendation only. Do not execute automatically.
Keep Shopify, Omni, and Klaviyo business records read-only until explicit approval is given.
